$comment: D-CSUBSET-BLOCK-SCOPE-PROTOTYPE: a block-scope function prototype (`int odd(int);` inside `even`'s body) refers to the file-scope function (C 6.2.2p4) — re-homed onto the file scope so it merges with the later definition; the forward call resolves to the real `odd`. Value-divergent: even(10)=1, odd(7)=1 -> exit 42. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert the Pass-1 re-home (bind in `current`) -> the block proto shadows, the call hits the bodyless shadow -> H0009, the program no longer COMPILES (compile failure, not exit 42). The release arm re-witnesses under the shipped pipeline (two ordinary mutually-recursive functions; no proto node survives lowering).
